text: swallowing the semi-solid food develops when the food is regularly given every day. It is important to ensure that hygienic practices are scrupulously followed. All the dietary ingredients should be thoroughly cleaned. Vegetables should be washed well to remove contaminants/ parasites/ pesticides before cutting. Vegetables should preferably be steam-cooked to reduce cooking losses. At the time of preparation and feeding of the recipes, mother should observe proper personal hygiene and the utensils used for cooking should be thoroughly washed or sterilized, 31 wherever possible. A number of pre-cooked and ready-to-eat foods can be prepared for use as complementary foods (Refer page 33). Such foods should be stored in clean bottles or tins.
